buttonA.name: Press Enter
buttonA.command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 36'

buttonB.name: Press Right Command Twice
buttonB.command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 54' -e 'delay 0.2' -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 54'

buttonY.name: Ctrl-A then Ctrl-K
buttonY.command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "a" using control down' -e 'delay 0.05' -e 'tell application "System Events" to keystroke "k" using control down'

rightShoulder.name: Press Ctrl-Enter
rightShoulder.command: osascript -e 'tell application "System Events" to key code 36 using control down'

script.name: switch-emacs-eca-chat-mode
script.command: osascript -e 'tell application "Emacs" to activate'; "/Applications/Emacs 2.app/Contents/MacOS/bin-arm64-11/emacsclient" -n --eval '(catch (quote done) (dolist (b (buffer-list)) (with-current-buffer b (when (or (eq major-mode (quote eca-chat)) (eq major-mode (quote eca-chat-mode))) (switch-to-buffer b) (goto-char (point-max)) (recenter -1) (throw (quote done) t)))) nil)'

script.name: switch-chrome-test-logseq
script.command: osascript -e 'tell application "Google Chrome" to activate' -e 'tell application "Google Chrome"' -e 'repeat with w in windows' -e 'set i to 1' -e 'repeat with t in tabs of w' -e 'if (URL of t contains "test.logseq.com") then' -e 'set active tab index of w to i' -e 'set index of w to 1' -e 'return' -e 'end if' -e 'set i to i + 1' -e 'end repeat' -e 'end repeat' -e 'end tell'

script.name: emacs-eshell-logseq-upsert-block
script.command: osascript -e 'tell application "Emacs" to activate'; "/Applications/Emacs 2.app/Contents/MacOS/bin-arm64-11/emacsclient" -n --eval '(let ((target (get-buffer "logseq-eshell"))) (if target (switch-to-buffer target) (progn (eshell) (rename-buffer "logseq-eshell" t))) (goto-char (point-max)) (unless (bolp) (insert "\n")) (insert "logseq upsert block -g demo -c " (string 39) (string 39)) (backward-char 1))'
